caption: A person's hand holds a sports trading card encased in a clear plastic protector, showcasing a gold-bordered card of baseball player Rod Carew. The card features a photo of Carew in a blue California Angels uniform and includes a signature. Text on the card reads "ROD CAREW" and "First baseman CALIFORNIA ANGELS". In the background, another man wearing a dark blue shirt sits at a desk with a computer setup. A logo for "JASPYS" and the website "CASEBREAKS.COM" are visible in the upper right corner of the frames, along with a smaller "JASPYS" logo further down. The scene is set in an indoor room with a palm tree graphic visible on a surface below the card. As the sequence progresses, the person subtly tilts and shifts the card, causing light to reflect off the gold border and the plastic case.
